summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest, 29 tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing of PocketBuddy. All 29 backend API tests pass — health, mood, expenses (incl. categorize), journal + weekly buckets, goals seed + PATCH, budget aggregation, subscriptions/savings/splits, wellness scores, sleep weekly, all 5 discover endpoints, life-balance, daily/weekly insights, and SSE chat streaming for all 4 buddies (finance/wellness/discover/helper) plus history GET/DELETE. Frontend: Home greets 'Good morning, Alex', all 5 Daily sub-tabs work, mood selection + 3 sliders update, 'Log Check-In' shows Saved confirmation, all 5 bottom-nav tabs switch screens with gradient headers. Finance has all 9 sub-tabs working, Wellness has 9 sub-tabs working with Pomodoro decrementing 25:00→24:58 and button switching to Pause, Discover has 9 sub-tabs, Chat Center shows all 4 buddy cards + Life Balance radar (79) + per-domain bars. Buddy chat (Finance) streams response word-by-word with ₹ amounts and 'Actionable tip:' suffix; custom input + send + back + clear all functional.

issues: Recharts console warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial render — charts do render visually after, but ResponsiveContainer parent likely has 0 height on first paint. Consider setting minHeight or aspect ratio.

action_items: (optional/cosmetic) Add minHeight or fixed aspect to ResponsiveContainer wrappers in chart pages to silence Recharts width=-1 warnings on first render.
(optional) Suggested-prompt buttons in BuddyChat only show when history is empty; if user has prior chat, prompts disappear. This is intentional but worth confirming as desired UX.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~604 lines and starts to flirt with the 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers (mood.py, finance.py, wellness.py, discover.py, helper.py, chat.py).
All API routes mutate/read for a hardcoded DEMO_USER='alex' — fine for demo but noted.
chat_stream persists assistant message inside the streaming generator after StreamDone — safe but if client disconnects mid-stream the partial message will still be saved (acceptable).
detect_category and simple_sentiment are simple keyword matchers — acceptable for MVP, but no unit tests guard against regression.
PATCH /goals/{id} does not validate that the goal_id belongs to the user before updating (uses {id, user_id: DEMO_USER}) — OK since user_id is forced; just noting.
_id is correctly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.
test_credentials: Not required — app uses hardcoded demo user 'alex', no auth.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds on startup automatically for user 'alex' (budget categories, subs, savings, splits, goals, 7-day sleep, 7-day mood, expenses). No additional seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All endpoints + UI flows verified. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_pocketbuddy_api.py covers 29 tests including SSE streaming for all 4 LLM buddies (gpt-5.2 / claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 / gemini-3-flash-preview) using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Streaming format is 'data: <chunk>

' terminated by 'data: [DONE]

'. Chat history is persisted in mongo collection chat_messages with {user_id, buddy, role, content}. SSE works end-to-end via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with X-Accel-Buffering:no header. Frontend Pomodoro confirmed counting down on /wellness focus tab. Only minor cosmetic note: Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on first paint but charts render correctly afterwards.
rca of the issue: No issues to root-cause — all features working as specified.
